config.title: Wizzard
config.script:
'nx_trace #include "50519"
'HAR* #include "50101" 'MessageBox #include "50122" 'getCurrent* #include "50203" 'system_add_root #include "50204" 'Excel* #include "50205" 'CWizzard #include "50209" 'CFilesDrives #include "50211" 'Preload functions #include "50303" 'Licence XML #include "50304" 'Export Firma #include "50615" 'ImportSTREAM -> NE OBJECTS #include "50616"
function fopen(): fopen = false
if (trans_.isvar(APPVAR_IMPORT_KIND)) then
select case trans_.var(APPVAR_IMPORT_KIND) case IMPFRM if (not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_IMPEXP38))) then exit function end if
case IMPXML if (not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_IMPEXPEUROBIZNES))) then exit function end if
case IMPXLS if (not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_IMPEXPXLS))) then exit function end if
case IMPEXT if (not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_IMPEXPEXT))) then exit function end if
case EXPXML if (not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_EXPXML))) then exit function end if
end select
end if
'Uruchom wizzard #ifdef _HJORT start_wizzard2 #else start_wizzard #endif
end function
#define NV_ALL 1 #define NV_NONE 2 #define NV_SYB 3 #define NV_SQL 4 #define NV_KADRY 5
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Kontener wizarda importu / eksportu '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- '---------------------------------------------------------------- 'NEW_FIRMA_IMPORT '---------------------------------------------------------------- dim g_pM60319 : set g_pM60319 = doc_.getmodule(60319)
class CImportWizzardContainer public m_strPath public m_strImportType public m_nNavoVersion public m_nNavoShow public m_bDefault public m_strLogin public m_strPass public m_strServer public m_pItems public m_bResult
private m_oNAVOFirmaImportOptions '---------------------------------------------------------------- public m_oarrExpFilter public m_nChoosenFilter
public m_nExportWay
Private Sub Class_Initialize() set m_pItems = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
m_strPath = "" m_nExportWay = clng(1) m_strImportType = "" m_nNavoVersion = "" #if appvarImportKind = EXPXML m_strLogin = getCurrentUser().strLogin #else m_strLogin = "sa" #endif m_strPass = "" m_strServer = "." m_nNavoShow = NV_NONE
m_bDefault = true
set m_oarrExpFilter = nothing m_nChoosenFilter = -1
set m_oNAVOFirmaImportOptions = g_pM60319.new_Option() End Sub
public function NewItemToImport() dim pNewItem set pNewItem = new CItemToImport
m_pItems.Add pNewItem set NewItemToImport = pNewItem end function #if appvarImportKind = EXPXML public function get_suggested_path() 'compose new suggested file name dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK) if (not bOK) then view_message 6161, 0 end if
dim strStartFile : strStartFile = m_oarrExpFilter.Value(m_nChoosenFilter).nazwa +_ "_z_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + ".nxd"
dim strStartPath : strStartPath = pFD.GetPath( m_strPath ) if (strStartPath="") then strStartPath="c:\" end if if right(strStartPath,1) <> "\" then strStartPath = strStartPath + "\" end if get_suggested_path = strStartPath + strStartFile end function #endif
public property get NFIO set NFIO = m_oNAVOFirmaImportOptions end property end class
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Klasa opisująca jeden element importowany / eksportowany ' ' m_nTypeID - identyfikator typu ' m_strName - nazwa wyswietlana w podsumowniu ' m_strParam1 - parametr 1 ' m_strParam2 - parametr 2 ' bDisplay - czy wyswietlac w podsumowaniu '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- class CItemToImport public m_nTypeID public m_strName public m_strParam1 public m_strParam2 public bDisplay end class
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Rozpocznij wizzard '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- dim g_pModule60272 : set g_pModule60272 = nothing
function start_wizzard()
if MessageBox("Czy chcesz pobrać dane z pliku?", "Pobieranie danych", vbYesNo, vbQuestion) = vbYes then dim pWizzard set pWizzard = CWizzard( false )
dim pContainer set pContainer = new CImportWizzardContainer
pContainer.m_strImportType = trans_.var(APPVAR_IMPORT_KIND) pContainer.m_strPath = "C:\Opakowania.xls"
if (pContainer.m_strImportType = EXPXML) then set g_pModule60272 = doc_.getmodule(60272) set pContainer.m_oarrExpFilter = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() 'wczytaj definicję dim idGlobFile : idGlobFile = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE,"nIndeks=GLOB_FILE_EXPORT_FILTER_DEFINITION") if idGlobFile > 0 then dim pGlobFile : set pGlobFile = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE,idGlobFile) if not pGlobFile.fPlik.isempty() then g_pModule60272.load_data pContainer.m_oarrExpFilter, pGlobFile.fPlik end if end if if pContainer.m_oarrExpFilter.Count() <= 0 then MessageBox "Nie zdefiniowano żadnego schematu eksportu", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if pContainer.m_nChoosenFilter = 0 end if
if (pContainer.m_strImportType <> IMPEXT and pContainer.m_strImportType <> EXPXML) then pWizzard.add_step PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FILE_STEP end if
dim bMiniImportFirma: bMiniImportFirma = false
if (trans_.isvar(APPVAR_SHORTIMPORT)) then if (trans_.var(APPVAR_SHORTIMPORT) = 1) then bMiniImportFirma = true end if else trans_.var(APPVAR_SHORTIMPORT) = CLng(0) end if
if (pContainer.m_strImportType <> IMPXML and (not bMiniImportFirma)) then pWizzard.add_step PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FIELD_STEP end if
if (pContainer.m_strImportType = EXPXML) then pWizzard.add_step PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FILE_STEP end if
pWizzard.add_container pContainer pWizzard.run
else import_XLSOpakowania nothing, "" end if
doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43016 appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_MAGAZYN_OPAKOWANIE_ZWROTNE varNewThread=1"
end function
function start_wizzard2()
dim pWizzard set pWizzard = CWizzard( false )
dim pContainer set pContainer = new CImportWizzardContainer
pContainer.m_strImportType = trans_.var(APPVAR_IMPORT_KIND)
if (pContainer.m_strImportType <> IMPEXT and pContainer.m_strImportType <> EXPXML) then pWizzard.add_step PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FILE_STEP end if
dim bMiniImportFirma: bMiniImportFirma = false
if (trans_.isvar(APPVAR_SHORTIMPORT)) then if (trans_.var(APPVAR_SHORTIMPORT) = 1) then bMiniImportFirma = true end if else trans_.var(APPVAR_SHORTIMPORT) = CLng(0) end if
if (pContainer.m_strImportType <> IMPXML and (not bMiniImportFirma)) then pWizzard.add_step PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FIELD_STEP end if
pWizzard.add_container pContainer pWizzard.run
end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' OBSLUGA KROKOW WIZZARDA ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Inicjacja strony kroku wizzarda '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function onPageInit(pWizzardPage)
with pWizzardPage.m_pContainer
select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage )
case PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FILE_STEP
#if appvarImportKind <> EXPXML 'Zainicjuj storne informacjami o dostepnych wersjach 'Navo Firma dim pInstallModule set pInstallModule = doc_.getmodule(60116)
dim pNVInfo set pNVInfo = pInstallModule.get_navo_firma_info()
if (not pNVInfo is nothing) then
'Instalacja zrodla danych Navo Firma jezeli 'go nie ma i jezeli wybralismy import z Navo Firma if (.m_strImportType = IMPFRM) then
if (pNVInfo.m_Sybase) then
'Tutaj tymczasowo inicjujemy kalsy eksportu 'by sprawdzic czy zalogowanie do wersji Sybase 'jest mozliwe i jezeli nie jest podejmujemy 'probe instalacji odpowiednich plikow
dim pTempExportManager set pTempExportManager = new CADOExportManager
pTempExportManager.m_bOnlyLogonTest = true
dim pImportContainer set pImportContainer = new CImportContainer
if (not pImportContainer.database_logon("", "", "", false, pTempExportManager)) then
view_message 6314, 0
dim instses set instses = createobject("navoinstall.session") instses.setlogname "navoSPRZEDAZ Serwer Setup.txt"
doc_.getmodule(72002).install_FirmaODBC pInstallModule, instses, false, false
if (not pImportContainer.database_logon("", "", "", false, pTempExportManager)) then 'Jeszcze jedna próba ale z instalacją sterownika ODBC doc_.getmodule(72002).install_FirmaODBC pInstallModule, instses, false, true else view_message 6315, 0 end if
end if
set pImportContainer = nothing set pTempExportManager = nothing
end if
end if
'Ustaw wartości domyślne dla kontrolek if (pNVInfo.m_Sybase and pNVInfo.m_MsSQL) then .m_nNavoVersion = "SQL" .m_nNavoShow = NV_ALL elseif (pNVInfo.m_MsSQL) then .m_nNavoVersion = "SQL" .m_nNavoShow = NV_SQL elseif (pNVInfo.m_Sybase) then .m_nNavoVersion = "SYBASE" .m_nNavoShow = NV_SYB end if
end if #endif end select
end with
end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Wejscie w jakis krok wizzarda '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function onPageEnter(pWizzardPage)
with pWizzardPage.m_pContainer
select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage )
case PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FILE_STEP #if appvarImportKind = EXPXML 'Ustaw zapamietana wczesniej sciezke dla wyboru plików .m_strPath = getglobprofile( GLOBPROF_EXPORT_PATH ) .m_strPath = .get_suggested_path() .m_strServer = getglobprofile( GLOBPROF_EXPORT_REMOTE_COMPUTER ) #else
'Jesli import z firmy inicjujemy specjalnie nasza 'strone wizzarda if (.m_strImportType=IMPFRM) then
'Jakie mamy wersje Navo Firma select case .m_nNavoShow case NV_ALL pWizzardPage.m_pPage.showNavoChoice()
case NV_NONE pWizzardPage.m_pPage.showNoNavo()
case NV_SYB pWizzardPage.m_pPage.showNavoSybase()
case NV_SQL pWizzardPage.m_pPage.showNavoPrestige() end select
end if #endif case PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_RESUME_STEP:
select case .m_strImportType
case EXPXML if .m_nExportWay = 1 then pWizzardPage.m_pPage.setFileInfo("do pliku " + .m_strPath) else pWizzardPage.m_pPage.setFileInfo("na komputer " + .m_strServer) end if
case IMPXML pWizzardPage.m_pPage.setFileInfo(.m_strPath)
case IMPXLS pWizzardPage.m_pPage.setFileInfo(.m_strPath)
case IMPFRM if (.m_nNavoVersion = "SQL") then pWizzardPage.m_pPage.setFileInfo("Wersja NAVO Prestige") end if if (.m_nNavoVersion = "SYBASE") then pWizzardPage.m_pPage.setFileInfo("Wersja NAVO Sybase") end if
end select
'Wypełnij informacją o obiektach gdy jakieś są pWizzardPage.m_pPage.fillObjsInfo
#if appvarImportKind = EXPXML case PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FIELD_STEP pWizzardPage.m_pPage.fill_schemas #endif end select
end with
end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Wyjście ze strony wizzarda '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function onPageExit(pWizzardPage) onPageExit=PAGE_DEFAULT
with pWizzardPage.m_pContainer
select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage )
case PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FIELD_STEP: #if appvarImportKind = EXPXML if .m_nChoosenFilter < 0 then MessageBox "Aby kontynuować musisz wybrać jakiś schemat", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if #else #if appvarImportKind = IMPFRM dim strCheckResult : strCheckResult = .NFIO.check() if strCheckResult <> "" then MessageBox strCheckResult, "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if #else if (.m_pItems.Count()=0) then MessageBox "Aby kontynuować musisz wybrać jakieś pola.", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if #endif #endif case PAGE_WIZZARD_EXPORT_IMPORT_FILE_STEP 'W przypadku importu z Navo Firma sprawdzamy 'czy jest jakas wersja NV if (.m_strImportType=IMPFRM and .m_nNavoShow=NV_NONE) then MessageBox "Nie ma w systemie wersji Navo Firma - nie można kontynuować.", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if
'W przypadku import/eksportu z/do pliku sprawdzamy czy 'wybrano plik i ewentualnie czy on istenieje i jest 'poprawny if (.m_strImportType=IMPXML or _ .m_strImportType=IMPXLS or _ .m_strImportType=EXPXML) then
'Gdy mamy podana sciezke if (.m_strPath <> "") then
dim strDestPath strDestPath = .m_strPath
dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK)
if (not bOK) then view_message 6161, 0 onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if
dim strFileName strFileName = pFD.GetFileName( strDestPath )
'Sprawdzamy czy jest nazwa pliku if (strFileName="") then MessageBox "Nie podano nazwy pliku.", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if
'W przypadku importów plik musi istnieć if (.m_strImportType <> EXPXML) then
if (not pFD.isFile( .m_strPath )) then MessageBox "Plik """ + CStr(.m_strPath) + """ nie istnieje.", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit = PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if
else
'Dodaj rozszerzenie nxd gdy nie podano dim strCheckFileName strCheckFileName = pFD.GetFileName( .m_strPath )
if (pFD.GetFileExtension( strCheckFileName )="" and strCheckFileName<>"") then .m_strPath = .m_strPath + ".nxd" end if
end if
else 'path is empty if .m_strImportType=EXPXML and .m_nExportWay = 1 then MessageBox "Nie podano nazwy pliku.", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit=PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if end if if .m_strImportType=EXPXML and .m_nExportWay = 2 then if trim(.m_strServer) = "" then MessageBox "Nie podano nazwy komputera docelowego.", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit=PAGE_DONOTEXIT exit function end if end if end if 'IMPXML, IMPXLS, EXPXML end select
end with
end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zakończenie całego wizzarda '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function onWizzardComplete(byref pWizzardPage): onWizzardComplete = false NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Import i eksport danych",nothing)
with pWizzardPage.m_pContainer
'Wykonaj odpowiedni tym importu select case (.m_strImportType)
case IMPFRM if (.m_nNavoVersion = "SQL") then onWizzardComplete = Import_FromFirma37(true, pWizzardPage.m_pContainer) end if if (.m_nNavoVersion = "SYBASE") then onWizzardComplete = Import_FromFirma37(false, pWizzardPage.m_pContainer) end if
case EXPXML
onWizzardComplete = exportXML( pWizzardPage.m_pContainer )
'store path for later if (onWizzardComplete) then dim pSubTrans set pSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran()
if .m_nExportWay = 1 then setglobprofile GLOBPROF_EXPORT_PATH, .m_strPath else setglobprofile GLOBPROF_EXPORT_REMOTE_COMPUTER, .m_strServer end if
trans_.saveobjects
set pSubTrans=nothing end if
case IMPXML onWizzardComplete = (importXML( .m_strPath ) = 0)
case IMPXLS onWizzardComplete = Import_FromExcel( .m_strPath, pWizzardPage.m_pContainer )
case IMPEXT onWizzardComplete = Import_AdditionalData( pWizzardPage.m_pContainer)
end select
'Aktywuj naszą stronę pWizzardPage.m_pPage.activate
'Komunikat czy się udało if .m_strPath <> "" then if (onWizzardComplete) then trans_.var(GVAR_MODALRES)=CLng(1) MessageBox "Operacja pobrania danych się powiodła", "Kreator wczytywania danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else MessageBox "Operacja pobrania danych się NIE powiodła - wczytano dane z bazy ", "Kreator wczytywania danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if end if
end with
NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' FUNCKJE IMPORTUJACE/EKSPORTUJACE ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
'-------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Funkcja importu danych z NavoFirma '-------------------------------------------------------------------- function Import_FromFirma37(byval bSQL, byref pWizzardContainer) : Import_FromFirma37 = false dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214)
dim pForeignConn if bSQL then set pForeignConn = pM60214.connectFirmaSQL(pWizzardContainer.m_strServer) else set pForeignConn = pM60214.connectFirma38Sybase() end if
if pForeignConn is nothing then MessageBox "Połączenie z bazą danych NAVO Firma nieudane", "Kreator eksportu/importu", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if
'store dim idUser : idUser = 0 if trans_.isvar(GVAR_USER) then idUser = trans_.var(GVAR_USER) end if dim idRokKsieg : idRokKsieg = 0 if trans_.isvar(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) then idRokKsieg = trans_.var(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) end if
Import_FromFirma37 = g_pM60319.do_import(pForeignConn,pWizzardContainer.NFIO)
'restore trans_.var(GVAR_USER) = idUser trans_.var(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) = idRokKsieg trans_.afc.userprofile.set_user trans_,trans_.var(GVAR_USER) end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Funkcja importu danych z pliku XLS (Excel) '-------------------------------------------------------------------- function Import_FromExcel(byval strFileName, byref pImportContainer) NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Import z pliku XLS",nothing)
dim pContainer set pContainer = new CExcelExpContainer
dim pExportManager set pExportManager = new CADOExportManager
pContainer.setExport pExportManager
'Ustaw kontener exportu pExportManager.setContainer pContainer
'Podlacz się do pliku excelowego if strFileName <> "" then if (not pContainer.logon(strFileName, pExportManager)) then view_message1 6309, 0, strFileName end if end if
#ifdef _HJORT 'import danych pracowników dla potrzeb wydruku PIT-11 doc_.getmodule(60284).import_XLSPit11Data pExportManager #else 'Importuj poszczególne obiekty import_XLSOpakowania pExportManager, "" #endif
Import_FromExcel = pContainer.end_import()
pExportManager.performing_destroy
set pExportManager = nothing set pContainer = nothing NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1)
end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Import dodatkowych danych kartotekowych '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function Import_AdditionalData(byref pImportContainer): Import_AdditionalData = false
with pImportContainer.m_pItems
dim i for i=0 to .UpperIndex()
select case (.value(i).m_nTypeID) case TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC if (not imPreload(T_PODZIAL_TERYTORIALNY)) then exit function end if
case TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA if (.value(i).m_strParam1 = "US") then if not imPreload(T_URZAD_SKRABOWY)then exit function end if end if
case TYPEID_N5BRANZA if (not imPreload(T_EKD)) then exit function end if
end select
next
end with
if (not trans_.saveobjects) then view_message 6159, 0 exit function end if
Import_AdditionalData = true end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Eksport poszczególnych obiektów do pliku XML '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function exportXML(byref pImportContainer): exportXML = false dim pExportFilter : set pExportFilter = pImportContainer.m_oarrExpFilter.Value(pImportContainer.m_nChoosenFilter)
if pImportContainer.m_nExportWay = 1 then exportXML = (pExportFilter.perform(pImportContainer.m_strPath) = 0) else exportXML = (pExportFilter.perform_remote(pImportContainer.m_strServer,_ pImportContainer.m_strLogin,pImportContainer.m_strPass) = 0) end if end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Import obiektów z pliku '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function importXML(byval strFileName) dim pImportHelper : set pImportHelper = doc_.getmodule(60211) importXML = pImportHelper.import_nxd_file_2_EB( strFileName ) end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Sprawdza czy zaznaczono do eksportu Firme '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function FirmaExist(byref pImportContainer): FirmaExist = false dim i for i = 0 to pImportContainer.m_pItems.UpperIndex() if (pImportContainer.m_pItems.value(i).m_nTypeID = TYPEID_N5FIRMA) then FirmaExist = true exit function end if next end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Sprawdza czy zaznaczono użytkownika do eksportu '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function UsersExist(byref pImportContainer): UsersExist = false dim i for i = 0 to pImportContainer.m_pItems.UpperIndex() if (pImportContainer.m_pItems.value(i).m_nTypeID = TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK) then UsersExist = true exit function end if next end function
'------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' OBSŁUGA PERFORMING'A ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dim pPrerformingXMLImp set pPrerformingXMLImp = nothing dim strOldTextXMLImp
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Event: Torzymy performing '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function ImportXML_CreatePerforming(byref pExpMan, byval strText) if (pPrerformingXMLImp is nothing) then page_.updateview set pPrerformingXMLImp = doc_.performing( strText ) strOldTextXMLImp=strText exit function end if
pPrerformingXMLImp.text = strText strOldTextXMLImp=strText end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Event: Niszczymy performing '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function ImportXML_DestroyPerforming(byref pExpMan) set pPrerformingXMLImp = nothing strOldTextXMLImp = "" end function
dim pPrerformingXML set pPrerformingXML = nothing
dim strOldXMLText
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Event: Torzymy performing '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function XMLExport_CreatePerforming(byref pExpMan, byval strToDisplay)
if (strOldXMLText=strToDisplay) then exit function end if
if (pPrerformingXML is nothing) then page_.updateview set pPrerformingXML = doc_.performing( strToDisplay ) strOldXMLText = strToDisplay exit function end if
pPrerformingXML.text = strToDisplay strOldXMLText = strToDisplay end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Event: Niszczymy performing '----------------------------------------------------------------------------- function XMLExport_DestroyPerforming(byref pExpMan) set pPrerformingXML = nothing strOldXMLText = "" end function
